name: gutter
zh-CN: 间距，支持响应式断点或水平/垂直分别设置
en-US: Gutter, supports responsive breakpoints or separate horizontal/vertical values

name: columns
en-US: Number of columns, supports responsive breakpoints

name: watchItemLayout
zh-CN: 是否监听子元素布局变化
en-US: Whether to watch child element layout changes

name: onLayoutChange
zh-CN: 布局变化时的回调函数

name: slots
zh-CN: 自定义插槽渲染函数，用于自定义子项渲染
en-US: Custom slot render functions for customizing item rendering

zh-CN: 语义化样式，包含 prefixCls / className / classNames / style / styles
en-US: Semantic styles, includes prefixCls / className / classNames / style / styles
